englishDefinitions: Used to say that someone felt a sudden strong shock, fear, or surprise.
Describes the feeling that your body seemed to react as if your heart suddenly sank.
persianTranslation: از شدت ترس/تعجب قلبم فرو ریخت
examples: When I saw the car coming toward me, my heart nearly dropped.
My heart nearly dropped when I heard the bad news.
At the last second, my heart nearly dropped, but everything was fine.
